living-abstract.essence: Engage with information at structural/relational level, not surface level
living-abstract.purpose: Make all cognitive work deeper by default -- analysis produces recall as byproduct
living-abstract.ability: Process information relationally (cause, contains, contradicts) not sequentially
Transform accumulated facts into structural understanding
Recognize when surface processing is occurring and shift to relational
living-abstract.principle: Structural encoding always beats surface encoding for retention and utility
Higher-order thinking generates lower-order as byproduct -- not the reverse
Kim Peak paradox: recall without reasoning is insufficient
Applies to ALL cognitive work -- reading, writing, consolidating, designing
